episode_text:
day=2; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Social with person on Left; time_of_day=morning;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize left occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=medium; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=less; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=100 sec

microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF food is cold-served fruit or dessert AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN no microwave BECAUSE the user chose not to reheat a cold-served strawberries-and-whipped-cream meal. IF food is a warm savory meal AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN 2 min BECAUSE the user chose reheating for chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup, indicating a preference for serving hot savory food warm.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user selected visibility-preserving behavior for a front-facing activity. IF dining context is social with person on left AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE the user selected behavior that preserves visibility toward the social partner on the left.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF food requires fork acquisition during feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is soft fruit/dessert bites such as the observed strawberries meal THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE the user selected the narrower bite orientation in that meal. IF food requires fork acquisition during feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is savory solid items such as the observed chicken nuggets meal THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE the user selected the orientation associated with stronger bite acquisition success for that food.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN far BECAUSE the user chose a larger stand-off distance while engaged with a front-facing activity, consistent with lower intrusiveness. IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN medium BECAUSE the user chose a somewhat closer but still outside-mouth distance in the social setting.

convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user preferred a nonverbal cue in that context. IF dining context is social with person on left AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user again selected a nonverbal cue, suggesting a stable preference to avoid speech-based prompts.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND dining context is watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN open mouth BECAUSE the user selected a low-effort readiness signal in a nonsocial front-attention context. IF task is feeding AND dining context is social with person on left AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit control in a social context, consistent with avoiding confusion between conversational mouth movements and readiness.

IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit sip initiation. IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit control, indicating a stable preference for manual initiation of drinking.

IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit wipe initiation. IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit control, indicating a stable preference for manual initiation of wiping.

convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user preferred a nonverbal completion cue. IF dining context is social with person on left AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user again selected a nonverbal completion cue, suggesting a stable preference against speech prompts.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN perception BECAUSE the user selected the reliable low-effort completion method for bites. IF task is feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN perception BECAUSE the user again selected perception-based completion, indicating a stable preference for automatic bite completion detection.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit completion signaling for drinking. IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit completion signaling, indicating a stable preference for manual drink completion.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit completion signaling for wiping. IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit completion signaling, indicating a stable preference for manual wipe completion.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN yes BECAUSE the user preferred the robot to retract between actions to reduce prolonged front occlusion while attending to the TV. IF dining context is social with person on left AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN yes BECAUSE the user also preferred retraction in a social setting, consistent with reducing obstruction toward a social partner.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food has no dip or sauce THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is not applicable. IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN more BECAUSE the user selected stronger dipping for strawberries with whipped cream in that context. IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is social with person on left THEN less BECAUSE the user selected a lighter dipping amount for ketchup in the social setting, consistent with reducing messiness around others.
